name: Day Trip: Ourika Valley & Atlas from Marrakech

seo.title: Ourika Valley Day Trip from Marrakech — Atlas & Setti Fatma | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private day trip from Marrakech in the Ourika Valley: river, Berber villages, local markets, Setti Fatma waterfalls, Nectarome garden.

hero.tagline: The Berber Ourika Valley, 30 km from Marrakech

intro: Just 30 km from Marrakech, the Ourika Valley offers a total change of scenery: a clear-water river, Berber villages clinging to the slopes of the High Atlas, traditional markets and the Setti Fatma waterfalls. An ideal day trip to discover Berber rural life and the wild nature of the Atlas in a single day.
